name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for GASE
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem statement

Describe the limitation, pain point, or use case.

## Proposed change

Describe the feature you want to see.

## Why it matters

Explain the expected impact on users, contributors, or maintainers.

## Alternatives considered

List any alternatives or workarounds you have already evaluated.

## Additional context

Add references, examples, or related issues if relevant.
